name: Fig Ginger Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Cooked Dried Figs, Sliced Fine
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil figs for 10 minutes, then drain and slice finely.
2. Cream sugar and shortening together until smooth.
3. Add beaten eggs and corn syrup to the mixture.
4. In a separate bowl, sift together flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, ginger, cloves, cinnamon, lemon flavoring, chopped nuts, and cooked figs.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, alternating with sour milk, until well combined.
6. Pour batter into greased layer cake pans.
7. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for about 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Serve warm and frost with ginger icing if desired.
